findings.evidence: `JHolomorphic.lean:36-44` puts the definition after normed-space variables; `AlmostComplex.lean:46-48` defines `AlmostComplexStructure` using only `[AddCommGroup V] [Module ℝ V]` and `V →ₗ[ℝ] V`.
findings.fix: Move `IsComplexLinearMap`, `isComplexLinearMap_iff_apply`, `zero`, `id`, and `comp` into an algebraic section with `[AddCommGroup V] [Module ℝ V]` etc., and introduce normed-space assumptions only for the derivative predicates.
findings.issue: `IsComplexLinearMap` and its algebraic lemmas are declared under the file-wide `[NormedAddCommGroup] [NormedSpace ℝ]` variables even though they only use real module structure.

findings.evidence: `JHolomorphic.lean:86-94` defines `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt`/`IsJHolomorphicOn`, but `JHolomorphic.lean:193-226` only has at/global composition; Mathlib has the corresponding setwise chain rules at `FDeriv/Comp.lean:74` (`HasFDerivWithinAt.comp ... MapsTo`) and `FDeriv/Comp.lean:194` (`DifferentiableOn.comp ... MapsTo`).
findings.fix: Add setwise composition first, e.g. `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.comp` with `hg : IsJHolomorphicWithinAt J' J'' g t (f x)`, `hf : IsJHolomorphicWithinAt J J' f s x`, and `hst : MapsTo f s t`, then derive `IsJHolomorphicOn.comp`.
findings.issue: Composition is proved only for `IsJHolomorphicAt` and global `IsJHolomorphic`, leaving the newly introduced `WithinAt`/`On` predicates without the natural setwise chain rule.

summary: The analytic predicates are at the intended fixed-structure level, but the API is under-generalized in two places: the purely linear predicate unnecessarily requires normed spaces, and the introduced setwise predicates lack the natural chain-rule lemmas.
